subject: Invoice #INV-2025-0342 — Cloud Services
body: Please find attached your invoice for cloud services for March 2025. Amount due: $149.00. Payment due by April 5, 2025.

attachment_texts.invoice_march.pdf: Invoice Number: INV-2025-0342. Billing period: March 1-31 2025. AWS EC2: $89. S3 Storage: $35. Data Transfer: $25. Total: $149. Due date: April 5 2025.
